lines.raw: Lesson 71 | 第71课
He's awful! | 他太讨厌了！

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: How did Pauline answer the telephone at nine o'clock?
lines.chinese: 9点钟时，波琳是怎样接电话的？
lines.raw: How did Pauline answer the telephone at nine o'clock? | 9点钟时，波琳是怎样接电话的？

lines.chinese: 罗恩·马斯顿是什么样的人，波琳？
lines.raw: What's Ron Marston like, Pauline? | 罗恩·马斯顿是什么样的人，波琳？
He's awful! | 他太讨厌了！

lines.english: He telephoned me four times yesterday and three times the day before yesterday.
lines.chinese: 他昨天给我打了4次电话，前天打了3次。
lines.raw: He telephoned me four times yesterday and three times the day before yesterday. | 他昨天给我打了4次电话，前天打了3次。

lines.english: He telephoned the office yesterday morning and yesterday afternoon.
lines.chinese: 他昨天上午和昨天下午都把电话打到办公室去了。
lines.raw: He telephoned the office yesterday morning and yesterday afternoon. | 他昨天上午和昨天下午都把电话打到办公室去了。
My boss answered the telephone. | 我的老板接的电话。

lines.english: What did your boss say to him?
lines.raw: What did your boss say to him? | 你老板对他说什么了？
He said, 'Pauline is typing letters. | 他说：“波琳正在打字。

lines.english: She can't speak to you now!'
lines.raw: She can't speak to you now!' | 她现在不能跟你讲话！”

lines.english: Then I arrived home at six o'clock yesterday evening.
lines.raw: Then I arrived home at six o'clock yesterday evening. | 昨天晚上6点我回到家。
He telephoned again. | 他又打电话来了。

lines.english: But I didn't answer the phone!
lines.raw: But I didn't answer the phone! | 可我没接电话！

lines.english: Did he telephone again last night?
lines.raw: Did he telephone again last night? | 昨晚他又打电话了吗？
Yes, he did. | 是的，打了。
He telephoned at nine o'clock. | 他在9点钟打电话来了。

lines.english: What did you say to him?
lines.raw: What did you say to him? | 你对他说了什么？
I said, 'This is Pauline's mother. | 我说：“我是波琳的妈妈。

lines.english: Please don't telephone my daughter again!'
lines.chinese: 请不要再给我女儿打电话了！”
lines.raw: Please don't telephone my daughter again!' | 请不要再给我女儿打电话了！”
Did he telephone again? | 他又打电话了吗？
No, he didn't! | 没有！
